props.ChoiceText: Something went missing beneath your watch, and from then on trust in the house became an account you had to balance publicly.
props.ChoiceBio: A household theft taught you that one missing thing can accuse a whole wing of a house.

0.TransitionText: Because a household theft taught you that one missing thing can accuse a whole wing of a house, household authority remained your daily craft.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Steward, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TargetText: Someone in service still remembers how you treated the innocent and the guilty when the search began.

0.TargetText: A servant or guard still trusts your eye when something vanishes.
